name: Select
goal: Provide a labelled single-select dropdown with help, error, and prefix/suffix slots over a native <select>.
description: Form-primitive companion to ce-input wrapping a native <select> for full keyboard, screen-reader, and OS-popup behaviour. Options accept the dual-mode CDR-005 shape — a JSON-on-attribute array or slotted <option>/<optgroup> children. Mirrors ce-input's label / help / error / prefix-suffix layout so forms compose consistently. Emits ce-change on selection.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name; echoed in ce-change detail.

props.name: help
props.description: Helper text below the field; hidden when error is set.

props.name: error
props.description: Error text below the field; overrides help when present.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Inline placeholder rendered as a disabled first option.

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the control as required and renders an asterisk on the label.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Renders the invalid border styling; aria-invalid follows.

props.name: options
props.description: JSON array of options ({value, label?, disabled?, group?}). When empty, slotted <option>/<optgroup> children are used instead.

events.name: ce-change
events.description: Fired when the user picks a different option.

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: Inline content rendered before the native control.

slots.name: suffix
slots.description: Inline content rendered after the native control; replaces the default chevron when used.
<option> / <optgroup> children for the slot-mode authoring path (CDR-005).

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-6
cssVariables.description: Native select right padding (room for chevron).

a11y.notes: Delegates to a native <select> so keyboard navigation, type-ahead, screen-reader semantics, and OS-level popup behaviour all come from the browser. aria-invalid follows the invalid prop / error message; label-for/id pairing wires the label to the native element.
